cards.back: Cleaning, handling missing data, transforming data into suitable format for analysis.
Combining two or more datasets into one dataset using the join or concatenate function.
Changing the structure or format of data to make it easier to analyze, such as converting data types or aggregating data.
Dividing continuous data into discrete categories or bins to simplify analysis.
A type of discretization where data is divided into equal-sized bins or ranges.
